'''Lalu Morwan''' was a [[Hapan]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] and a former flight surgeon onboard the ''[[Kendall]]'' during the [[Swarm War]].

==Biography==
During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], Morwan was an operative for the [[Heritage Council|Hapan independence movement]] allied with the [[Five Worlds|Corellian Confederation]] and had contracted [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] to kill [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]]. However, Morwan's plans backfired once the Solos interfered with their operations. Seeing nowhere else to go, she boarded the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] with the Solos and their droid, [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], whom she found quite annoying. After fixing [[Han Solo/Legends|Han's]] arm, Morwan attempted to force the Solos into the battle between [[Galney (Ducha of Terephon)|Ducha Galney]] of [[Terephon]] and the Heritage Council and the [[Hapan Royal Navy]] fleet still loyal to Tenel Ka by threatening to shoot Han if [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] did not return to the battle. However, her plan failed when Han disarmed her, breaking her nose.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
